creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<http://ftp-archive.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-Archive/old-releases/amd64/README.TXT>: 

> NOTE: Old releases are available at:
> 
>   ftp://ftp-archive.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-Archive/old-releases/

(Is this even a bug? Can we reasonably ignore outdated information in _archived_ content such as README.TXT files?)

----

<http://ftp-archive.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-Archive/old-releases/README.TXT> is OK with regard to http instead of ftp, but the URL for mirrors is outdated.
